name: gemini-relay
description: Relay Codex prompts to Gemini and return the response.

interface.shortDescription: Relay plain-text Gemini tasks from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Gemini Relay opens Gemini in the user's existing Chrome session, detects guest versus signed-in access, sends a plain-text prompt, waits for the visible Gemini response, and returns the completed answer. Signed-in conversations are stored so they can be continued, polled, and listed. Text-first: no model switching, attachments, or image generation; guest chats cannot be continued.
defaultPrompt: Ask Gemini to summarize this issue.
Ask Gemini to critique this design.
Ask Gemini to explain this error.
